meaning: n.基纳巴卢山(东南亚最高峰,位于马来西亚)
examples: Mount Kinabalu is the highest mountain in Southeast Asia.
Here is the mother sea and the holy mountain of Kinabalu Shangri-La.
This five-star Kota Kinabalu hotel also offers a decadent spa and delicious on-site dining.
On the return trip to Kota Kinabalu, a light snack is served in period-style stacking tiffin boxes, and the visuals outside the train are replayed in reverse.
For something a bit less strenuous, the entrance area of Mount Kinabalu park is beautiful and features some easy walking trails that showcase alpine Borneo flora and fauna.
